overall.description: A smooth aerial drone shot through a game engine (likely Arma 3) capturing a sunny coastal settlement. The camera glides along sandy beaches past colorful wooden beach houses - a red building with satellite dish, a yellow cottage, and a main wooden complex - with calm ocean waters and distant hills visible under a clear blue sky.

agents.ego_description: flying drone low along the beach coastline, maintaining steady altitude while paralleling the shoreline

entered.detail: calm blue sea stretching to the horizon under clear sky
sandy beach with patches of dry grass and small white flowers
single-story red wooden building with white-framed windows and satellite dish
large satellite dish mounted on the roof of the red building
dry brown grass and small shrubs growing on sand dunes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a sweeping view of a tranquil beach and ocean. The drone moves steadily forward along the coastline, keeping a red wooden beach house with a prominent satellite dish on the right side. Sparse coastal vegetation covers the sandy ground, and distant hills are visible across the water.

events.description: red building passes out of view as yellow beach house becomes the dominant structure on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing drone flight past the yellow building and approaching the main wooden house complex

notable_agents.action: blue pickup truck parked near the yellow building entrance

entered.detail: bright yellow wooden cottage with white trim and multiple windows
large beige wooden building with covered porch and shingled roof
dark blue pickup truck parked on dirt near the buildings
unpaved dirt path running between the buildings

segments.scene_description: The drone passes the red building and enters a small coastal settlement area. A bright yellow beach house appears on the left, while the main wooden building complex comes into view ahead. A blue pickup truck is parked near the structures, and the ocean shifts to the right side of the frame as the camera curves left.

events.description: camera begins arcing around the main wooden building to reveal its side and back

agents.ego_description: circling the drone around the main wooden house to survey the building from multiple angles

entered.detail: expansive field of dry brown grass and wildflowers behind the buildings

segments.scene_description: The drone arcs around the main wooden building complex, moving from the beach side to the inland side. The yellow house and truck pass behind, replaced by an open field of dry grass. The red building reappears on the right from a new angle, while the main wooden house shifts to the left as the camera completes its survey of the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide along a tranquil coastline that transitions from an open beach view into a detailed survey of a small coastal settlement. It begins by sweeping forward along the sandy shore, keeping a red wooden beach house with a satellite dish to the right while distant hills frame the horizon. As the camera passes the red building, the scene opens into the heart of the settlement where a bright yellow cottage and a blue pickup truck appear before the drone curves left toward a main wooden building complex. The movement then arcs around this central structure, shifting the perspective from the oceanfront to the inland side. Finally, the yellow house and truck recede as the camera glides over a field of dry grass, repositioning the red building and the main house within the frame to complete the survey of the area.
